desc.en: Taiwan's top university. Strong in semiconductors and engineering.
desc.zh: 台湾顶尖大学，半导体和工程实力强。

climate.zh: 台北亚热带气候。夏季炎热潮湿（28-35°C），冬季温和偶冷（12-18°C）。5-6月梅雨季，夏秋有台风。
climate.en: Taipei subtropical climate. Summers hot and humid (28-35°C), winters mild (12-18°C). Plum rain May-Jun, typhoons in summer-autumn.

housing.en: On-campus dorms ~NT$5000-8000/month (~$160-260). Off-campus in Gongguan/Da'an NT$8000-15000/month.

employment.zh: 台湾顶尖学府。台积电、联发科等半导体巨头及科技业大量招聘NTU毕业生。
employment.en: Taiwan's top university. TSMC, MediaTek and other semiconductor/tech giants actively recruit NTU graduates.

healthcare.zh: 台湾全民健保，留学生入学6个月后可加入。月缴约NT$826。未加入前需自费或买商业保险。
healthcare.en: Taiwan's NHI available after 6 months of enrollment. ~NT$826/month. Before that, self-pay or private insurance needed.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请国际学位学程。需高中成绩、英语/中文证明、推荐信、自传。
application.en: Apply for international degree programs via website. Transcripts, English/Chinese proficiency, recommendations, autobiography required.

safetyDetail.zh: 台北是全球最安全的城市之一。夜间出行安全，便利店密布。校园开放但有保安巡逻。
safetyDetail.en: Taipei is one of the world's safest cities. Safe at night with ubiquitous convenience stores. Open campus with security patrols.
